title: Bright & Homely Essentials Non-Stick Baking Tray 32CM (Single Pack)
features: NON-STICK BAKING TRAYS – These baking trays feature a high-quality non-stick surface that makes food release effortless and cleanup quick. Avoid abrasive cleaners or metal scourers to preserve the non-stick finish.
HIGH HEAT RESISTANT – Oven-safe up to 230°C / 450°F / Gas Mark 8, these trays are built to handle high temperatures without warping.
DISHWASHER SAFE – Designed with convenience in mind, these trays are dishwasher safe, saving you time and effort after cooking or baking.
VERSATILE KITCHEN ESSENTIAL – Ideal for a range of uses: bake cookies, roast vegetables, cook small pizzas, or use as a chip pan or baking sheet. A practical addition to any kitchen.
description: BRIGHT & HOMELY ESSENTIALS NON-STICK BAKING TRAY 32CM
